facts.text: Case subject: firmware image FW-377, version v1, under release check.
The declared method resolves offsets to 5 cm; its recorded reference-class error rate is within the accepted band.
Survey E-3 was taken on 2026-05-16 with a calibrated instrument and full step-log compliance.
A later audit at 1 cm resolution, dated 2026-06-15, recorded a 3 cm offset.
The draft completion statement closes the review on the method's result.
